Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a statue of a sword and staff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The sword stands for evolution and strength,[n]and the staff stands for knowledge and youth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's something on the floor[n]by the bottom of the statue...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a statue of a sword and staff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It is sometimes used as a meetup spot for[n]students during lunch and after school...[n]{f 1 1}
